text:
is a fictional character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. 

Profile

In Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA, Kaji has a major role in the stopping of the Human Instrumentality Project by leaking the attack plan of the Mass Production Evangelions from SEELE to NERV. In order to find out where SEELE went underground after the failed Third Impact, he travels around the world with Kensuke Aida looking for them.
